query: SELECT o.slug, o.name, COUNT(f.id) as file_count FROM organizations o LEFT JOIN uploaded_files f ON f.organizationId = o.id GROUP BY o.slug, o.name HAVING file_count > 0 ORDER BY file_count DESC LIMIT 5
